overview.description: MDS Foundations provides foundational CSS classes for layout, typography, and more.

usage.description: Import the whole foundations.cSS file to use all CSS classes across your project, or import specific files as needed.

api.description: The MDS offers a set of light-weight utility classes to help with common flexbox layout patterns.

classes.name: mds-flex
classes.usage: Use mds-flex class to create a flex container.

classes.name: mds-flex-items-start
classes.usage: Use mds-flex-items-start class to align flex items to the start of the flex container.

classes.name: mds-flex-items-center
classes.usage: Use mds-flex-items-center class to align flex items to the center of the flex container.

classes.name: mds-flex-items-end
classes.usage: Use mds-flex-items-end class to align flex items to the end of the flex container.

classes.name: mds-flex-items-baseline
classes.usage: Use mds-flex-items-baseline class to align flex items to the baseline of the flex container.

classes.name: mds-flex-items-stretch
classes.usage: Use mds-flex-items-stretch class to stretch flex items to fill the flex container.
